stemHtml: An aircraft flying under IFR in controlled airspace and maintaining FL150 requests a descent. – A second aircraft maintaining FL140 on the same route also requests a descent and receives the clearance "descend to FL70, report passing FL100". – The aircraft at FL150 can expect to receive a clearance for descent to FL140 or below when the aircraft at FL140 has..

options.d: reported that it has left FL100.
